# `/difficulty` Command
Sets the difficulty level.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/difficulty <difficulty: Difficulty>`

### `/difficulty <difficulty: int>`

## Arguments
- `difficulty`: [Difficulty](../enums/Difficulty.md)
- `difficulty`: int
